products.descriptionHtml:
HOFMANN Hat by Urees x Brand di niente

*BRAND DI NIENTE IS AN ARTESANAL HAT MAKER BASED IN NAPLES.

Introducing the hand-made Noguchi Hat by Urees x Brand di niente – a fusion of contemporary design and eco-conscious craftsmanship. Crafted from repurposed denim jeans, each HOFMANN Hat embodies the spirit of sustainability and artistic innovation.

Artistic Upcycling: The HOFMANN Hat reimagines the concept of duck, transforming discarded denim into a stylish accessory. Every hat is a testament to our commitment to reducing waste and promoting environmental stewardship.

Versatile Style: Whether you're strolling through city streets or embarking on outdoor adventures, the HOFMANN Hat offers both style and functionality. Its timeless design and adjustable fit make it suitable for any occasion.

Individual Expression: Please note that due to the upcycling process, each HOFMANN Hat is unique, featuring distinct denim patterns and textures. Embrace the individuality of your hat and wear it as a personal statement of your commitment to sustainable fashion.

Elevate Your Look: Pair your HOFMANN Hat with your favorite outfit and make a bold statement while supporting sustainable practices. Join us in redefining fashion with purpose and creativity.

One-of-a-Kind: Please note that each HOFMANN Hat may have unique color patterns and brand elements. This diversity is a testament to the individuality of every piece.

Elevate Your Style: Pair your HOFMANN Hat with your favorite outfit and step into the world with a touch of artistic innovation. After all, fashion should be an expression of your creativity.

---

products.title: MARCEL BAG BLACK
products.descriptionHtml:
MARCEL Bag Black by Urees: Where Art Meets Functionality

Introducing the MARCEL Bag by Urees – a distinctive blend of artistic flair and practicality. Handcrafted with precision in the vibrant heart of Barcelona, Spain, this bag pays homage to the revolutionary spirit of Marcel Duchamp, a pioneer in the world of art and design.

Washing guide:

Hand Washing or Gentle Machine Wash:

  1. Turn Inside Out: Before washing, turn the pants inside out to protect the colors.

  2. Use Cold Water: Wash in cold water to prevent color bleeding.

  3. Mild Detergent: Use a gentle detergent to preserve the fabric.

  4. Short Cycle: Select a quick and gentle washing machine cycle.

  5. Air Dry: Hang the pants to air dry in the shade. Avoid direct sunlight.

Keep in mind: Denim doesn't need frequent washing. Unless they are heavily soiled, washing after every few wears is usually sufficient to maintain their look and feel.

Freshness Tip: To remove odors, consider freezing your denim pants in a sealed bag overnight instead of washing.

Washing guide:

Hand Washing or Gentle Machine Wash:

  1. Turn Inside Out: Before washing, turn the pants inside out to protect the colors.

  2. Use Cold Water: Wash in cold water to prevent color bleeding.

  3. Mild Detergent: Use a gentle detergent to preserve the fabric.

  4. Short Cycle: Select a quick and gentle washing machine cycle.

  5. Air Dry: Hang the pants to air dry in the shade. Avoid direct sunlight.

Keep in mind: Denim doesn't need frequent washing. Unless they are heavily soiled, washing after every few wears is usually sufficient to maintain their look and feel.

Freshness Tip: To remove odors, consider freezing your denim pants in a sealed bag overnight instead of washing.
